name: @kanban-task-engine/cli
description: Kanban task engine command line interface

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outfile=dist/bin.js --external:fsevents --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module';const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
